questions.question: How many of every 10 U.S. men under the age of 50 are the proud owners of a pair of Dockers Khakis?
What late-night hit has Bill Maher say: "It's all been satirized for your protection"?
Who managed to print 200 Bibles in 1455 before going bankrupt?
What fat substitute got FDA approval for use in snack foods, despite reports of diarrhea and cramps?
Who scored a record ten hat tricks in one NHL season?
What magazine has been called "a monthly version of Sex and the Single Girl"?
